wiki.extract: Staples Inc. is an American office supply retail company headquartered in Framingham, Massachusetts.

cases.court: United States Bankruptcy Court, N.D. Indiana
United States Bankruptcy Court, E.D. North Carolina

cases.caseName: Smitherman v. Staples Contract & Commercial LLC

sampleRecords.event_description: Other fall to lower level  less than 6 feet
sampleRecords.final_narrative: An employee was delivering products and loading a manual pallet jack when they tripped and fell 4 feet to the floor, striking their head and resulting in a skull fracture.

sampleRecords.event_description: Collision between a moving and standing vehicle, nonroadway
sampleRecords.final_narrative: An employee went to step off material handling equipment to grab their jacket when the throttle of the vehicle engaged. The vehicle reversed and the employee's left foot was crushed between two material handlers, resulting in a fracture.

sampleRecords.event_description: Pedestrian struck by vehicle in nonroadway area, unspecified
sampleRecords.final_narrative: An employee was wrapping a pallet to be shipped. As he was walking around the pallet with a roll of shrink wrap, a forklift ran over his right heel and broke it.

sampleRecords.event_description: Caught in running equipment or machinery during maintenance, cleaning
sampleRecords.final_narrative: On March 1, 2023, at 2:34 a.m., a maintenance employee responded to a work order on a conveyor belt that was making noise from the line. The employee removed the belly pan from underneath the conveyor system to visualize and troubleshoot it, and then left to clean the pan. When the employee came back to the conveyor line, he saw some debris under the roller where he had removed the belly pan. He a

sampleRecords.nature: Multiple traumatic injuries and disorders, unspecified
sampleRecords.event_description: Pedestrian struck by vehicle in nonroadway area, unspecified
sampleRecords.final_narrative: An employee was taking inventory in an aisle when they were struck by a forklift. The employee sustained a head wound and lower back injury.

topHazards.label: The legs on the base of the chair can break, posing a fall hazard.
The chair can tip over when leaning back, posing a fall hazard.
The base of the chair can break, posing a fall hazard.
The UV glass lens on the lamp can crack, exposing the halogen bulb, posing a fire and burn hazard.
The legs on the base of the chair can break, posing a risk of injury to the user.

sampleRecalls.title: Staples Recalls Hazen Mesh Office Chairs Due to Fall Hazard
sampleRecalls.description: This recall involves Staples and Quill Hazen Mesh Task chairs. The chair has a five-wheel base, black fabric seat cushion, and black mesh seat back. The chairs have SKU number1058246 and item number 26680 printed on a white label on the underside of the seat cushion.
hazards: The legs on the base of the chair can break, posing a fall hazard.
injuries: Staples has received 20 reports of the legs breaking on the chairs, including three reports of injuries resulting in minor cuts and bruises.

sampleRecalls.title: Staples Recalls Back in Motion Office Chairs Due to Fall Hazard
sampleRecalls.description: This recall involves Staples and Quill brand "Back in Motion" office chairs. The black, bonded leather chair has a tilt function and a base with wheels. The chairs have SKU # 203439 and item number SBG 24422 printed on the white label on the underside of the seat cushion. A second label, also located on the underside …
hazards: The chair can tip over when leaning back, posing a fall hazard.

sampleRecalls.title: Staples Recalls Office Chairs Due to Fall Hazard (Recall Alert)
sampleRecalls.description: The office chairs with unpadded arms have a five-wheel base and come in two colors: gray and burgundy. A tag on the bottom of the seat cushion has the SKU and item numbers printed on it: the gray SKU is 924204 with item number 21084; and the burgundy SKU is 924203 with item number 21083.
hazards: The base of the chair can break, posing a fall hazard.
injuries: Staples has received 41 reports of the chairs' base breaking, including three from consumers who reported falling out of the chairs with one receiving a scratched leg and bump to the back of the head.

sampleRecalls.title: Catalina Lighting Recalls Halogen Clamp Lamps Due to Fire and Burn Hazard; Sold Exclusively At Staples Stores
sampleRecalls.description: The halogen clamp lamps, also known as architect's lamps, have a 150-watt halogen bulb, an articulating arm, and a clamp desk lamp that adjusts up, down and swivels. Only lamps with model number 13456-US and lot numbers C06081581V185, C06081582V185 and C06081584V185 are included in the recall.
hazards: The UV glass lens on the lamp can crack, exposing the halogen bulb, posing a fire and burn hazard.
injuries: Catalina Lighting has received 65 reports of broken lenses. No injuries have been reported.

sampleRecalls.title: CPSC, Gruga U.S.A. Announce Recall to Repair Office Chairs Sold At Staples Stores
sampleRecalls.description: The recalled executive office chairs include the 795-0115 model with black leather and the 795-0228 model with black fabric. Underneath the seat cushion the name "Novimex Fashion Ltd." can be found on the large label and the model numbers and date codes can be found on a smaller label. Only chairs with a date code pri…
hazards: The legs on the base of the chair can break, posing a risk of injury to the user.
